pythonFunction.name: set_reservation_basics
pythonFunction.description: Record party size and/or preferred date for the reservation. Call this tool whenever the guest mentions how many people OR a date, even if only one value is provided. Parse natural language for party size ('just me'=1, 'a couple'=2, 'four of us'=4) and dates ('this Friday', 'July 4th', 'tomorrow' -> YYYY-MM-DD). Call immediately, even alongside other info in the same message.
